q: Which prophet saw the Lord seated on a throne, high and exalted, in the year King Uzziah died?
Which prophet was told to go to the potter's house to receive a message?
Which prophet was among the exiles by the Kebar River when he saw visions of God?
Which prophet was asked by God, 'Can these bones live?'
Which prophet was given the name Belteshazzar in Babylon?
Which prophet was commanded to marry a woman named Gomer?
Which prophet predicted the outpouring of the Holy Spirit on all people (quoted by Peter at Pentecost)?
Which prophet was a shepherd of Tekoa?
Which prophet wrote a very short book (1 chapter) against the nation of Edom?
Which prophet fled to Tarshish instead of going to Nineveh?
Which prophet said the Messiah would be born in Bethlehem?
Which prophet wrote about the fall of Nineveh (besides Jonah's message)?
Which prophet complained to God about the success of the wicked and was told the 'righteous will live by his faith'?
Which prophet's name means 'My Messenger' and wrote the last book of the OT?
Which prophet encouraged the rebuilding of the Temple during the time of Zerubbabel?
Which prophet saw a vision of a flying scroll?
Which prophet predicted that the sun of righteousness would rise with healing in its rays?
In which book do we find the prophecy of the New Covenant written on hearts?
Who was the 'son of Buzi'?
Which prophet mentioned the 'abomination that causes desolation'?
Which prophet saw a basket of summer fruit?
Which prophet spoke against the city of Tyre?
Which prophet had a vision of the Lord with a plumb line?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would enter Jerusalem riding on a donkey?
Who was the prophet during the reign of King Hezekiah?
Which prophet saw a vision of four chariots coming out from between two mountains of bronze?
Which prophet spoke about the 'Day of the LORD' more than any other (often called the 'Prophet of the Day of the LORD')?
Which prophet was thrown into a cistern (muddy pit)?
Which prophet saw a vision of a man with a measuring line in his hand?
Who was the father of Isaiah?
Which prophet said 'Let justice roll on like a river'?
Which prophet predicted that the moon would turn to blood before the great and dreadful day of the LORD?
Who wrote 'Comfort, comfort my people, says your God'?
Which prophet saw the glory of the LORD depart from the Temple?
Which prophet mentioned 'Noah, Daniel and Job' as three righteous men?
Which prophet predicted the exact length of the Babylonian captivity (70 years)?
Which prophet saw a vision of a scroll that was written on both sides with lament and woe?
e: Ezekiel 2:10 and Revelation 5:1 (John's scroll was similar)

q: Which prophet said 'The heart is deceitful above all things'?
Which prophet predicted that the mountain of the LORD's temple would be established as the highest of mountains?
e: Isaiah 2:2 and Micah 4:1 have the same prophecy.

q: Which prophet saw a vision of Joshua the high priest standing before the angel of the LORD?
Which prophet predicted that God would send 'Elijah the prophet' before the day of the LORD?
Who was the 'son of Pethuel'?
Which prophet was a priest from the town of Anathoth?
Which prophet saw a vision of the Lord standing by an altar and saying 'Smite the capitals'?
Which prophet predicted that the nations would beat their swords into plowshares?
e: Isaiah 2:4 and Micah 4:3. Joel 3:10 says the opposite.

q: Which prophet mentioned the 'valley of Decision'?
Which prophet saw a vision of a gold lampstand with two olive trees?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would be 'cut off' after 62 sevens?
Which prophet said 'Not by might nor by power, but by my Spirit'?
Which prophet saw a vision of the Lord's glory returning to the Temple through the East Gate?
Which prophet was swallowed by a great fish after trying to flee from God?
Which prophet was thrown into a lions' den for praying to God?
Who was the 'weeping prophet'?
e: Jeremiah is known for his sorrow over Jerusalem.

q: Which prophet was taken up to heaven in a whirlwind and a chariot of fire?
Which prophet succeeded Elijah and performed many miracles, including healing Naaman?
Which prophet confronted King David about his sin with Bathsheba?
Which prophet saw a vision of a valley of dry bones coming to life?
Which prophet was called by God as a young boy in the Temple?
Which prophet was a dresser of sycamore-fig trees before being called by God?
Which prophet predicted that a virgin would conceive and give birth to Immanuel?
Which prophet was told to buy a linen belt and hide it in a crevice in the rocks?
Which prophet saw a vision of a wheel within a wheel?
Which prophet was fed by ravens near the Kerith Ravine?
Which prophet multiplied a widow's oil to help her pay her debts?
Which prophet was mocked by youths for being bald, leading to a bear attack?
Which prophet wrote the book of Lamentations?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would be born in Bethlehem?
Which prophet saw a vision of a plumb line?
Which prophet said, 'But let justice roll on like a river, righteousness like a never-failing stream!'?
Which prophet's book is the shortest in the Old Testament?
Which prophet predicted the 'New Covenant' where God's law would be written on hearts?
Which prophet saw a vision of a woman in a basket (an ephah)?
Which prophet was told to name his children 'Lo-Ruhamah' and 'Lo-Ammi'?
Which prophet predicted that God would 'rebuild David's fallen tent'?
Which prophet saw a vision of a golden lampstand and two olive trees?
Which prophet urged the people to rebuild the Temple, saying, 'Is it a time for you yourselves to be living in your paneled houses, while this house remains a ruin?'?
Which prophet saw a vision of Joshua the high priest in filthy clothes being cleansed?
Which prophet predicted the fall of Nineveh (besides Jonah)?
e: The book of Nahum is entirely about Nineveh.

q: Which prophet asked, 'How long, LORD, must I call for help, but you do not listen?'?
Which prophet was told to shave his head and beard and divide the hair into three parts?
Which prophet saw a vision of four horsemen?
Which prophet had a servant named Gehazi?
Which prophet healed Naaman the Syrian of leprosy?
Which prophet predicted that the sun would move back ten steps for King Hezekiah?
Which prophet saw a vision of a man with a measuring line?
Which prophet said, 'He has shown you, O mortal, what is good... To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God'?
Which prophet was told to eat a scroll that tasted like honey?
Which prophet saw a vision of the LORD sitting on a throne, with seraphim above him?
Which prophet predicted the return of 'Elijah' before the day of the LORD?
Which prophet was told, 'Before I formed you in the womb I knew you'?
Which prophet saw a vision of a basket of ripe fruit?
Which prophet's name means 'My Messenger'?
Which prophet said, 'But you, Bethlehem Ephrathah... out of you will come for me one who will be ruler over Israel'?
Which prophet was among the exiles by the Kebar River?
Which prophet saw four living creatures, each with four faces?
Which prophet interpreted the handwriting on the wall for Belshazzar?
Which prophet saw a vision of a valley of dry bones?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would be 'wounded for our transgressions'?
Which prophet was told to marry a woman of whoredom to symbolize Israel's unfaithfulness?
Which prophet was a priest from the town of Anathoth?
Which prophet saw the Lord standing by an altar and saying 'Smite the capitals'?
Which prophet predicted that the nations would beat their swords into plowshares?
Which prophet mentioned the 'valley of Decision'?
Which prophet predicted that the Messiah would enter Jerusalem on a donkey?
Which prophet saw a vision of a flying scroll?
Which prophet spoke about the 'Day of the LORD' more than any other?
Which prophet was given the name Belteshazzar?
Which prophet predicted the exact length of the Babylonian captivity?
Which prophet saw the glory of the LORD depart from the Temple?
Which prophet mentioned 'Noah, Daniel and Job'?
